text:
I hear the amplifiers cry
Fire on the avenue tonight
We chase the thunder till the sunrise

Leather boots and neon rain
Every chorus breaks the chain
We sing louder than the pain

City lights are melting into gold
We dance like every heartbeat can be sold
Your name keeps sparkling in the cold

Mirror balls and midnight blue
Every line comes back to you
We make the silence feel brand new

Bassline heavy, every bar precise
I turn the pressure into paradise
Footprints on the beat like rolling dice

Notebook full of scars and schemes
I build a kingdom out of broken dreams
Count the rhythm, split the seams

Trumpets breathe in amber smoke
Soft piano answers every joke
Moonlit glasses shimmer when we spoke

Velvet shadows on the floor
Brushes whisper by the swinging door
Night keeps asking for a little more

Down the road where the old pines sway
I keep a lantern for the fading day
Home is every song the sparrows play

River stones and weathered hands
We stitch our hope into the farming lands
Morning rises slow across the sands
